name: Qishen Zhou
title: Tang Aoqing Young Scholar · Associate Professor
org: School of Transportation, Jilin University | Department of Traffic Information Engineering and Control
intro: Ph.D. candidate, Zhejiang University (Intelligent Transportation), 2020/09–present; Visiting Ph.D., ETH Zurich, 2023/11–2024/10; B.S. in Traffic Engineering, Huazhong University of Science and Technology, 2016/09–2020/06; Visiting student, UNSW, 2019/07–2019/08.
interests: Data-driven network-wide traffic state estimation, prediction, and reliability.

notice.title: Recruiting Graduate Students
notice.body: We welcome applications from students interested in transportation planning, intelligent transportation systems, and related areas (M.S.). Please send your CV and a brief statement of research interests to the email above.

news.title: Paper accepted
news.body: Paper "Network-Wide Freeway Traffic Estimation Using Sparse Sensor Data: A Dirichlet Graph Auto-Encoder Approach" accepted by IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems 🎉

news.title: Paper accepted
news.body: Paper "MoGERNN: An Inductive Traffic Predictor for Unobserved Locations" accepted by Transportation Research Part C: Emerging Technologies 🎉

news.title: Paper accepted
news.body: Paper "CASAformer: Congestion-aware Sparse Attention Transformer for Traffic Speed Prediction" accepted by Communications in Transportation Research 🎉

news.title: Completed visiting PhD at ETH Zurich
news.body: Completed the joint Ph.D. program at ETH Zurich and returned.

news.title: Started visiting PhD at ETH Zurich
news.body: Started the joint Ph.D. program at ETH Zurich.
